headline: Transportation Secretary Duffy Says Air Travel Will Get Cheaper After War
summary: Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy says that air travel will eventually become cheaper than it was before the war in Iran began.  Bloomberg reported that Delta Air Lines’ jet fuel prices have doubled in the past month, quoting Delta CEO Ed Bastian talking about passing along the higher costs to consumers.  Duffy told Fox in response to that reporting that a lot of airlines are "eating the cost" of the recent increase in jet fuel prices.
